topic: Debug Your AI Agent: How to See Exactly What Copilot Is Thinking
hook: Your agent isn't broken — you just can't see what it's thinking (until now)
audience: Developers who troubleshoot agent behavior or want to understand why their agent customizations aren't working
keyTakeaway: The #debugEventsSnapshot context attachment reveals exactly what customizations loaded, token usage, and agent decision points
talkingPoints: The problem: Your agent customizations don't seem to be working and you have no idea why
New in VS Code 1.111: #debugEventsSnapshot lets you attach agent debug info to chat
Demo: Using the sparkle icon in Agent Debug panel to capture a snapshot
What the snapshot reveals: loaded customizations, token consumption, and decision paths
Real troubleshooting example: Finding why my copilot-instructions.md wasn't being applied
trendContext: Debug events snapshot is a new feature in VS Code 1.111 (March 9, 2026) - perfect complement to the existing custom agent content pillar on troubleshooting agent behavior
